expectations.evidence: Report [Important]: 'tests are coupled to internal helpers rather than public behavior... imports from ../src/internal/helpers.'
Refactoring: 'removed caller-specific comment that encoded upstream knowledge.'
Report [Minor]: 'internal helper API was newly exported publicly without observed entrypoint consumers... export * from ./internal/helpers.'
Report [Important]: 'domain service now directly owns infrastructure DB connection, violating dependency direction... constructs and connects a Postgres client internally.'
